name: Photographic Storytelling with Joe Greer
overview: Learn how to capture simple, stunning, purpose rich photos. With the beautiful American Northwest as your classroom, Joe teaches you everything he has learned over the last 10 years. How to re-discover your why, to see the shots you are missing, and use basic photography techniques to capture the best photos of your life. Joe’s lesson will help you to slow down, falling back in love with your own photography. And just maybe he will help you to break out of your Instagram rut.
